title: Verify ALIGNING steer sign fix on hardware
description: The Pi differential steering formula in aruco_navigator.py had inverted steer sign — l=fwd+steer,r=fwd-steer was producing right turns when bearing_err was negative. Fixed to l=fwd-steer,r=fwd+steer in commit 7e22693. Run robot at gate 0 and confirm it now turns LEFT toward the gate opening rather than into the inside post. Check no overshoot with steer_kp=0.3.

title: Upload FIRMWARE_VERSION=4 main.py to Yukon via Thonny
description: The latest main.py (FIRMWARE_VERSION=4) with per-module motor telemetry (12 new RESP IDs, TYPE_MOD_TELEM=0x09) has NOT yet been uploaded to the physical Yukon RP2040. Must use Thonny — tools/upload.py is broken. Also upload bno085.py if needed.

title: Live test ground_station_v2.py on hardware
description: ground_station_v2.py needs to be tested on hardware to verify: (1) record idempotency — starting a recording when one is already running should be a no-op, (2) RC SG switch (3-position) correctly starts/stops recording. See project_todo_ground_station_test.md memory for context.

title: Calibrate cam_heading_offset for front cameras
description: cam_heading_offset is currently 0.0 (reverted from a previously measured 23.3°). To calibrate: set cam_heading_offset=0, aim robot dead-ahead at a tag, read bearing_err from the ALIGNING debug log, then set cam_heading_offset to MINUS that value. Do this for both front_left and front_right cameras. Update robot.ini with the correct value.
